items.title: Tracing a bad RAG answer post-hoc
items.scenario: User reports a hallucinated answer; you can't reproduce.
items.explanation: Search logs by `request_id` (bound at entry). You see: query → retrieved top-5 → reranker dropped the relevant doc → assembled prompt missing key context. Root cause in 2 minutes.

items.title: Cost monitoring via INFO logs
items.scenario: Token bill spiked yesterday; which endpoint caused it?
items.explanation: Every LLM call logs `INFO` with `model`, `prompt_tokens`, `completion_tokens`, `endpoint`. Aggregate in your log store: 'sum tokens by endpoint, last 24h'. The culprit pops out.

items.title: WARNING on 429s, no PagerDuty noise
items.scenario: Rate-limit retries are common; you want visibility without paging.
items.explanation: `logger.warning('rate-limited; backing off', extra={'attempt': i, 'next_delay': delay})`. Dashboards count warnings; alerts fire only if rate exceeds threshold.

items.title: logger.exception inside except
items.scenario: A parser sometimes fails on weird LLM JSON.
items.explanation: `logger.exception('parse failed', extra={'raw': raw[:500]})`. Logs include the traceback automatically, plus the first 500 chars of the offending payload.

items.title: Per-module DEBUG without flooding
items.scenario: You want to investigate only retrieval; the rest of the system at INFO.
items.explanation: `logging.getLogger('ragapp.retrieval').setLevel(logging.DEBUG)`. Cascades to all sub-modules of retrieval; INFO stays elsewhere.
